title: Add static Database Schema Viewer page

requirements.text: Create a new static page file `frontend/src/pages/DatabaseSchemaPage.tsx` that displays the 10 core database tables — Users, Doctors, Specialties, Doctor_Schedules, Appointments, Payments, Reviews, Medical_Records, Corporate_Accounts, and Subscriptions — as individual cards arranged in a responsive grid layout. Each card must show the table name as a heading and list all field names (with their data types) for that table as plain text rows. The page must be a single, self-contained React functional component that exports a default component. It must contain no routing logic, no backend or API calls, no database connections, no state management (no useState, useReducer, or context), no external library imports beyond React itself and Tailwind CSS classes, no animations, no reusable sub-components, no dynamic rendering (no .map, conditional rendering, or computed values), no props, and no hooks (no useEffect, useState, useRef, etc.). All content must be written as hardcoded JSX. Styling must follow the existing Medical Blue theme using Tailwind utility classes consistent with the rest of the application.
acceptanceCriteria: The file `frontend/src/pages/DatabaseSchemaPage.tsx` exists and exports a default React component.
The component contains exactly 10 table cards: Users, Doctors, Specialties, Doctor_Schedules, Appointments, Payments, Reviews, Medical_Records, Corporate_Accounts, Subscriptions.
Each card displays the table name as a heading and lists all field names with their data types as hardcoded static text.
The file contains no import statements other than React (and optionally React types).
The file contains no useState, useReducer, useEffect, useRef, useContext, useCallback, useMemo, or any other hook calls.
The file contains no function props, no component props interface, and the exported component accepts no props.
The file contains no .map(), .filter(), .reduce(), or any array/object iteration for rendering.
The file contains no conditional rendering (no ternary operators or && short-circuit rendering).
The file contains no routing imports or navigation logic (no useNavigate, Link, router, etc.).
The file contains no fetch, axios, or any API call.
The file contains no CSS keyframe animations or transition classes.
All card content is written as explicit, hardcoded JSX elements.
The page renders correctly in the browser with all 10 table cards visible and readable.
The styling uses Medical Blue theme Tailwind classes consistent with the rest of the application.

constraints: The DatabaseSchemaPage component must contain absolutely no hooks, state, props, routing, API calls, animations, dynamic rendering, or external library imports.
All 10 table schemas must be hardcoded as static JSX — no data arrays, no .map() calls.
Do not modify any immutable frontend paths (frontend/src/hooks/*, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui).
nonGoals: Registering a route for this page in App.tsx is not required unless it can be done without violating the static-only constraint on the page file itself.
Linking to this page from any navigation component.
Adding real database connectivity or backend queries.
Using any animation or transition effects.
Making any fields interactive or filterable.
